'''Bacta Squad''' was a [[Squad/Legends|unit]] of the [[Katarn Commandos]] that fought near [[Shimrra's Citadel]] alongside [[Jeedai heresy|Jeedai Heretics]] in the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]].<ref name="TUF" />

{{Military-stub}}
